titleStmt.title: SII 23.310: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 310. (A.R. No. 310 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the second eastern gōpura, right of entrance Rājarājadēva [III]: year 6+1

summary.p: A few syllables at the end of each line are inaccessible and the inscription is also damaged. It seems to register an order of the king confiscating the lands belonging to some persons who proved traitorous (to the king ?) and distributing them, some by way of auction (Rājarājapperuvilai) and some by sale at estimated price. The details are not clear. However, the temple of Tiruviḍaimaruduḍaiyār is mentioned as having purchased some land in auction. Reference is made to Tillai-ambala-chaturvēdimaṅgalam as the tirunāmattukkāṇi and [dēvadāna ?]-iṟaiyili of God Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-Uḍaiyār, [Naṭarāja] and his consort Tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya-Periyanāchchiyār. Some bhaṭṭa-vṛitti lands at Tribhuvanavīra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam are also referred to as having been granted as sōdakumbha (for the merit of the dead king) of Periyadēvar evidently meaning Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III who was known by the other name Tribhuvanavīradēva.
Could the treachery referred to above be a symptom of the king's weakness that contributed to his serious trouble later in his life ?

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājateva
yāṇṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu ḷ 3 100 4 10 ṉāl ḷ 3 100 10
Iṭṭa niṉaippiṉpaṭi turokamceyta māttūr kiḻavaṉ
yañceytāṉum cūriyatevaṉum Ariyalūruṭaiyāṉ piḷḷai
ṭaṅkaṉum tiruñāṉacampantaṉum puricaikkiḻaiyāṉ tillaip�
ṉum vikkiramacoḻaṉum nandipperumāṉum
ṭaiyāṉum poyyilā meyyaṉum peru
ḻaāṉum Aṇṇavāyil Uṭaiyāṉ cotiyum kiḷiyūr
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉum Ivvūraṉubhavamu
mapperilum turokattukku U
māṟiṉa nilattu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārum tirukkā
muṭaiya periya nācciyārkkum tirunāmattukkāṇiyum
yiliyākavum Eṟṟi Aruḷiṉa Akaram
tillaiampalacaturvedimaṅkalattu
kiṭaippuṟam Uḷḷiṉavaiyiṟṟukkum vāsudevarkkum periyateva
sotakumpamāka tiripuvaṉa viracaturvedimaṅkalattu kiṟa brāhmaṇarkku
m bhaṭṭavṛtti kiṭaippuṟam Uḷḷuṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum Ivvūril
ṟṟaṉa brāhmaṇarkku paṅkukkuṭalākak kūṭṭiṉa nilattu ceravallāṉ
tavirnta nilattukku talaimāṟu Iṭṭa nilamum palarkkum kāṇiya
ṭa nilamum palarkkum rājarājap peruvilai viṟṟa nilamum viṟka
niṉaippu Iṭṭa nilamum perun tavittum ciṟutaṉattu veṭṭai
kkuṭi Iruppum jivitamumāṉa nilattu Aṉubhavam mallāma
coḻavaḷanāṭṭu veṭṭai vijjātira nallūrkku talaimāṟu
ṟṟa nilamum nikki nikki niṉṟa nilamum kāṇi koḷvārkkum rāja rāja
l viṟkavum viṟkumiṭattu Innilattu vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyāṉ Aṉubhava
varukiṟa nilattu Ivarum puravari śrīkaraṇa
yāṉum vilaimatitta kācukku viṟkavum
maiyār karuvukalattu Oṭukka
keyarāyarum vāṇādharāyarum
yārum vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyārum puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakarum Īṅkaiyuṭai
tirumantiraolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷārum Eḻuttiṭṭa
kuṭukkavum tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉamaiyāl Uṭalāka koṇ
ḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇ
tevarkaṉmikaḷukku rājarājap peruvilai viṟ
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa ṉār tevartāṉa
kkuṭiyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa
ṉ Utaiyañcey
The next three lines are seriously damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.310 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
